title: Coral Crafting
description: Craft coral blocks using corals and coral fans. 2x2 or 3x3 crafting!
body:
## Craftable Corals

Enjoy a wider range of renewable blocks! With Craftable Corals you can finally craft coral blocks!


## Why use Craftable Corals?

Protect the reefs! Killing an entire coral reef is devastating both in Minecraft and the real world. At least in Minecraft we can stop it easily! Using the renewable corals and coral fans you can craft coral blocks instead of destroying the beautiful world generation.


## Why are there two versions?

Since Craftable Corals adds a way to farm an otherwise renewable block I consider it fair to be at least a little bit grindy. The 3x3 version is probably the one I'd go for but I totally understand everybody who is eager to build but does not want to deal with grinding the required corals. The 2x2 version aims to satisfy people who prefer that playstyle.
